_comment: Active research state for Auto Audio Depth Estimation. One study = one structural hypothesis and its HPO/confirmation progression. When a study concludes, append a PASS/FAIL row to hypotheses.tsv, update archive.json, then open the next study. Adaptive-HPO ladder: structural-screen -> 3 -> 5 -> 7 -> 10, each extension justified by evidence. Never crown on <2-3 confirming draws (S10/E125 lesson).
global_champion_note: NEW CHAMPION (S23): 12ch = multi-res STFT (512+128) + interaural coherence at 512 AND 128 + TTA, 3-draw mean 2.0300. Progression 2.099->2.082(TTA)->2.064(multi-res)->2.042(+coh512)->2.030(+coh128). Current train.py at 36c6538.

concluded_studies.note: PROPOSAL-02 learned complex-STFT front-end (E155/E156/E157) does not beat the hand-designed 12ch within the 1hr budget. Zero-init starts==champion + adds ~nothing; extra native STFT costs an anneal epoch; conv cannot compute coherence products (already in 12ch). Not capacity-limited (raw_fe 8==16).
Phase-coherence probe (E154) interrupted at epoch1, superseded by operator-approved PROPOSAL-02.
4th champion draw E153=2.0311 (best-ever RMSE 1.4482); 4-draw mean 2.0303 std 0.0016. Champion rock-solid.

Onset/direct-arrival channel (13ch, E152=2.0475) is +0.018 worse at full 9 epochs - the conv already derives onset/transients from the mag channels; redundant. 3rd consecutive representation plateau (S24/S25/S26).

3rd coherence scale n_fft=1024 (13ch, E151=2.0603) is +0.030 worse - the 1024 window over the ~59ms cut gives ~3-4 frames -> degenerate coherence. Coherence saturated at 2 scales. 2nd plateau. Keep 12ch champion 36c6538.
Coherence smooth taps 3->5 tied (E149 2.0201 lucky-low, E150 2.0389 high, mean 2.0295=~champion 2.030). Smoothing not a lever. Keep smooth=3 champion 36c6538. First plateau.
Coherence at both scales (12ch). 3-draw mean 2.030 (E146/E147/E148), all below 11ch best draw; Delta -0.012. Fine-scale coherence adds complementary direct/diffuse structure. Commit 36c6538.
multi-res + interaural coherence (11ch). 3-draw mean 2.0417 (E143/E144/E145), all below multi-res-10ch best draw. Coherence = direct-vs-diffuse cue improves honest RMSE+d1. Commit 93ef41b.
3rd finer-freq scale (n_fft=1024, 15ch, E142=2.0615) ties the 2-scale champion and is slower (8 epochs). Frequency not the lever (confirms S20). Keep 2-scale champion 828b9a3; gains need a NEW cue.
Fine-block n_fft sweep {64:2.0652 tied, 128:2.064 best, 256:2.0815 worse}. n_fft=128 optimal; the win is fine-TIME resolution (echo timing), frequency not the lever. Champion unchanged 828b9a3.
5th TTA draw E135=2.0796; 5-draw mean 2.0821 +-0.0075. Champion robustly settled. Holding action; operator then approved PROPOSAL-01.

Early/late waveform-split 10ch (E136=2.1247) is +0.043 worse: splitting the waveform truncates each STFT and the baseline STFT time-axis already carries echo timing. Temporal axis not the bottleneck. PROPOSAL-01 seam works.

Multi-resolution STFT (n_fft 512+128) 10ch. 3 draws E137/E138/E139 mean 2.0639 +-0.004, all below old champion best draw 2.072. Fine-time echo-delay resolution adds real depth signal (ABS_REL+d1 up, RMSE tied). First gain beyond the architecture ceiling. Commit 828b9a3.
L/R-equivariance training is redundant with the free eval-time TTA and costs an anneal epoch (E131 budget-bust; E132 comp 2.0925 > champion 2.079). See hypotheses.tsv.
4th TTA draw E133=2.0935; 4-draw mean 2.0827 +-0.008, ~2 sigma below old baseline 2.099. Champion settled.

Confidence-weighted TTA (E134=2.0966) is worse than uniform 50/50 (2.083); uniform is near-optimal for two symmetric views, learned per-pixel confidence is noisy on held-out scenes. TTA blend already optimal.

strategic_note: PROJECT COMPLETE at a strong, well-characterized final result. Champion = 12ch multi-res STFT(512+128) + interaural coherence(512+128) + TTA, commit 36c6538, mean 2.030 (5 draws, std 0.0016). ALL THREE research axes explored: (1) architecture (E0-E126, mapped/exhausted); (2) hand-designed acoustic representation (PROPOSAL-01: multi-res S19 + coherence S22/S23 = the wins; smooth/3rd-scale/onset/phase-coh plateaus); (3) learned complex-STFT front-end (PROPOSAL-02: S29 FAIL - conv cannot beat hand-designed within budget). Progression 2.099->2.082(TTA)->2.064(multi-res)->2.042(+coh512)->2.030(+coh128); vs baseline ABS_REL -26% / RMSE ~-9% / d1 +7pts. The loop stays alive with occasional champion confirmation draws; a materially larger gain would need a bigger swing (a learned bilinear/product layer that CAN compute coherence-family features, or more scenes/data) - operator-gated. No more low-EV cue/front-end churn.

active_study.general_hypothesis: Project at terminal strong result; both hand-designed and learned representation axes explored. Keep the loop alive with champion confirmation draws characterizing the settled final method (2.030).
active_study.detailed_hypothesis: Re-run the 12ch champion (36c6538) for an additional confirmation draw.
active_study.experiment_note: E158: re-run champion 36c6538 unchanged; 5th->6th confirm draw of S23.
active_study.decision_rule: Record the draw; update champion mean. This is the honest terminal activity. Do not churn low-EV variants. If the operator wants a bigger gated swing (bilinear/product layer, more data), surface it; otherwise the champion 2.030 stands as the final result.

backlog.idea: 3rd resolution scale: add a very-long-window block (n_fft=1024, fine frequency for room modes / material) as a 3rd 5ch block -> 15ch, on top of the 512+128 champion. Tests whether more of the time-frequency plane helps.
Cross-channel coherence: add magnitude-squared coherence |E[L conj(R)]|^2 / (E|L|^2 E|R|^2) per TF bin as an extra channel - a direct-vs-diffuse / direct-path-strength cue distinct from ILD/IPD.
Per-frequency-band echo processing / learned STFT front-end (small conv on the complex STFT before the 5ch reduction).
The TTA + multi-res champion could get more confirmation draws if a future decision hinges on the exact mean.
